title: Part-Time Tutor (Web Development) – Aptech Computer Education
body:
Developed and delivered comprehensive, hands-on curricula for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals, enabling students to grasp core web-development concepts.

Mentored learners and provided feedback to support their growth in programming and design.

title: Lead Designer & Software Developer – Fidia Creatives Inc.
body:
Led end-to-end development of brand design and strategy, establishing a consistent visual language across all company assets.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate business objectives into impactful design solutions, enhancing brand recognition and market presence.

Oversaw a dynamic design team and managed relationships with outsourced resources and vendors, optimising workflow efficiency.

Directed the conceptualisation and execution of various design initiatives, delivering high-quality visual assets that met client specifications and project deadlines.

title: Lead Designer – Cavemen Agency
body:
Oversaw brand identity and marketing visuals for multiple clients.

Directed design initiatives and optimised workflows for a creative team, ensuring consistent, high-quality delivery under tight deadlines.

Managed design resources and vendors to maintain high-quality deliverables.

title: Visual Designer (Contract) – Quru Lab
body:
Designed visuals for social media, presentations, and product demos.

Developed print and digital media assets to support product launches and marketing campaigns.

Built and managed design standards, delivery processes, and team coordination.

title: Visual Designer/IT – Kuwego Global
body:
Defined overall product design strategy and long-term creative goals for the team.

Built and led a design team while managing outsourced vendors and resources, establishing design standards and delivery processes.

title: Graphic/Brand Designer – Imagine Cinemas
body:
Created graphics for social media, demos, and presentations, contributing to brand redesign and marketing campaigns.

Led design efforts and managed outsourced resources to ensure consistent delivery of visual assets.

title: Graphic Designer – EasyFarm Hub
body:
Designed print and digital visuals for marketing campaigns and supported outsourcing vendors to ensure brand consistency.

Established design standards, delivery requirements, and overall design process facilitation.

title: Graphic/Visual Designer (Volunteer) – Google Business Group Abeokuta
body: Created branded visuals for community events and campaigns, promoting digital literacy and entrepreneurship.
